description_long: This is a large, modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior features numerous large rectangular windows arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, providing ample natural light to the interior. The front facade includes a prominent entryway with a single door, flanked by tall windows and a double garage. The property is surrounded by a low fence and includes a spacious yard with paved walkways and several stylized trees. The rear of the house opens onto a patio area, ideal for outdoor gatherings, and is bordered by additional fencing for privacy. The overall aesthetic is minimalist, with a focus on straight lines and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a double garage, and a fenced yard with stylized trees. The design is geometric and minimalist, emphasizing clean lines and open outdoor areas.
description_view_0: This view shows the side and partial front of the house, highlighting the flat roof, large windows, and the fenced yard with two stylized trees.
description_view_1: The rear view reveals the patio area, backyard fencing, and a cluster of trees, with the house's back windows and balcony visible.
description_view_2: This side view emphasizes the length of the house, the flat roof, and the arrangement of trees and fencing along the property.
description_view_3: The front view displays the main entryway, double garage, symmetrical window arrangement, and a single tree to the left.
attribute_entryway_design: Central single door with tall side windows, no porch, and a double garage; minimal decorative elements.
